document.source_title: Massive blow for LSG as star player leaves camp before final two games
document.summary: Aiden Markram has left the Lucknow Super Giants camp due to personal reasons, missing the remainder of IPL 2026. This departure comes just before crucial matches against Rajasthan Royals and Punjab Kings, impacting LSG's performance despite being out of playoff contention. Markram's absence could influence the playoff race, particularly for teams like Rajasthan, who are still vying for a spot.
key_takeaways: Aiden Markram leaves LSG camp for personal reasons.
Markram will miss the final two matches of IPL 2026.
Lucknow Super Giants are already out of playoff contention.
Rajasthan Royals are still in the playoff race, needing wins.
Markram's absence could affect the playoff scenarios.
LSG has shown improvement recently, winning two of their last three matches.
document.why_it_matters: Markram's departure is significant as it affects LSG's competitive edge in their final matches, which could influence the playoff standings for other teams. The dynamics of the tournament are impacted as teams like Rajasthan Royals still have a chance to qualify.
